title: astragalus nitens subsp. viridis
intro: Astragalus nitens subsp. viridis, also known as the green astragalus, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its use in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Astragalus nitens subsp. viridis include its ability to enhance immune function, reduce stress, and promote cardiovascular health. Astragalus nitens subsp. viridis is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and can also be consumed as a tea or capsule, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
